description: Condition: Used - Good. Age Range: All ages. Its available don't ask or will be ignored and make your offer amount $ and time you want to pick up. Best offer gets it. No food or box toys included. No trays that were inside are gone!! Really cute toy. Please refer to actual item photo for reference. Sizing is about a foot tall, not life size don't ask if human size it's not!! Dimensions: Measures approximately 18" (H) x 13.5" (W) x 6.5" (D).

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Skip this trip — too many missing accessories and best-offer pricing makes it not worth your time
must_include_reason_themes: many accessories missing compared to retail or promo photo not just a few
incomplete set makes the toy much less usable or fun
best offer with no listed price is too much hassle for a used toy
age range listed as all ages is not accurate for this product
actual seller photos show empty compartments and missing trays
should_ask_seller: what is your price for this
any damage or missing parts beyond the trays
is there anything else you can sell along with this
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good despite missing parts and incomplete set

notes.photo_signal: Photos 1–2 are real home shots of a pink Minnie Mouse toy kitchen with doors open; many interior trays and accessories missing. Photo 3 looks like a retail or Amazon-style image with full accessories and toy food, unlike what is actually for sale.
notes.why_this_grade: Comparing the promo or retail image to the actual listing photos shows far too many missing accessories — not just a tray or two, enough to make the toy much less fun. Best-offer-only with no price adds hassle; easier to find another toy. Avoid the trip.
notes.pm_note: Seller language is slightly rude but also no-BS; neutral on tone. Dimension details in multiple forms are helpful. Promote to UI demo after eval pass — see build notes backlog.
